title: Acyclic quantum cluster algebras via Hall algebras of morphisms
author_string: Ming Ding, Fan Xu, Haicheng Zhang
abstract: Let $A$ be the path algebra of a finite acyclic quiver $Q$ over a finite field. We realize the quantum cluster algebra with principal coefficients associated to $Q$ as a sub-quotient of a certain Hall algebra involving the category of morphisms between projective $A$-modules.
comment: 28 pages; To appear in Mathematische Zeitschrift
